steps.title: Combine the $x$ terms
steps.content:
The $x$-coefficient is $3p-16p-64$, so the expression becomes:
$$6x^2+(-13p-64)x+24$$

steps.title: Match the target coefficient
steps.content:
The equivalent expression is $6x^2-155x+24$, so the $x$-coefficients must be equal:
$$-13p-64=-155$$
$$-13p=-91$$
$$p=7$$

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content: $p=7$ matches choice B. A quick coefficient check gives $-13(7)-64=-155$, exactly the target $x$-coefficient.
